goal: Построить и проверить base-conditional overlay модели (veto / early-cut / hold-extension) на trade surface immutable базы active-signal-v1@1, чтобы улучшить качество уже существующих сделок без изменения базовой логики.
global_constraints: active-signal-v1@1 is immutable: never retune, reselect, or modify base signals, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic
full-surface directional classification on leadership/breadth/path-asymmetry/regime features is permanently closed (v4–v7 terminal verdict)
CatBoost regression on future PnL is permanently closed
classifier-transition as standalone directional layer is permanently closed
all labels must be frozen before any model training begins
no threshold or feature selection on lockbox window — selection OOS only
all comparisons are matched: same trade window, same notionals, strict overlay evaluation against immutable base
veto route must show signal before opening early-cut; early-cut must show signal before opening hold-extension
all datasets are trade-level (entry-timestamp keyed), not anchor-level

stages.title: Closure-audit v7 и фиксация инвариантов v8
stages.objective: Formally record the terminal verdict of v7 (full-surface directional classification failed), establish the v8 pivot to trade-quality overlays, and lock down the immutable base reference plus research map axes.
actions: Open a new research_project for v8
Record in research_record: classification route on full surface = terminally failed, why it is closed, why v8 pivots to trade-quality overlays
Freeze immutable reference: snapshot_id=active-signal-v1, version=1, symbol=BTCUSDT, anchor=1h, execution=5m
Set up research_map axes: overlay_route, side, feature_family, label_family, model_stage, final_decision
Create open-items register: trade_surface_atlas, veto_label_contract, veto_long, veto_short, earlycut_route_lock, extension_route_lock, final_overlay_verdict
success_criteria: v8 research_project exists with unique project_id
v7 terminal verdict formally recorded with rationale
immutable reference snapshot frozen and unchangeable
research_map axes populated
all 7 open-items registered and tracked

stages.title: Построить trade-surface atlas immutable base
stages.objective: Build a comprehensive trade-level atlas of every executed base trade over the full available period, capturing side, timing, PnL, path shape, MFE/MAE, and entry context, with stratified breakdowns to identify worst-decile, fragile, and underheld trades.
actions: Collect all trades from immutable base over full available period
For each trade record: side, entry time, exit time, realized PnL, MFE, MAE, time-in-trade, exit reason, weak-window membership, context at entry, path in first 1h/3h/6h
Build stratified cuts: long vs short, winners vs losers, stop-loss vs time-limit vs take-profit, weak quarters, weakest pockets
Isolate: worst-decile trades, fragile trades, underheld winners
success_criteria: atlas covers all base trades in available data window with complete fields
long/short split counts and summary statistics computed
worst-decile, fragile, and underheld-winner subsets explicitly identified and tagged
exit-reason breakdown available (TP/SL/time-limit)
milestone_node recorded for downstream stages

stages.title: Freeze overlay label contracts
stages.objective: Define and freeze all overlay label schemes (veto, early-cut, extension) with balanced and conservative variants plus an ambiguity policy, before any model training begins.
actions: Define veto labels: bad_trade_balanced and bad_trade_conservative with explicit positive-class criteria per side
Define early-cut labels: cut_now_balanced and cut_now_conservative
Define extension labels: extend_hold_balanced and extend_hold_conservative
Define ambiguity policy: handling of near-zero trades, mixed trades, and what constitutes material improvement
success_criteria: all 6 label definitions (2 per route) have explicit positive-class criteria for long and short sides
ambiguity policy documented: near-zero, mixed, and material-improvement thresholds
labels are frozen — no changes allowed after this stage without formal re-open

stages.title: Feature contract для trade-quality overlays
stages.objective: Design, validate, publish, and materialize the complete trade-quality feature layer across families A–D (entry context, post-entry path, exit context, cross-confirmation), with veto-priority features built first.
actions: Define feature contracts for families A–D with exact computation specs

Priority 1 — veto features: cf_entry_stretch_6h, cf_entry_range_position_12h, cf_entry_exhaustion_score, cf_signal_freshness, cf_confluence_density, cf_trade_eth_btc_confirmation, cf_trade_breadth_confirmation, cf_trade_event_headwind
Priority 2 — post-entry features: cf_first_1h_followthrough, cf_first_3h_adverse_excursion, cf_first_3h_support_reclaim, cf_post_entry_instability, cf_early_failure_signature
Priority 3 — exit-time features: cf_mfe_before_time_limit, cf_trend_persistence_at_time_limit, cf_exit_context_strength, cf_reversal_risk_at_time_limit, cf_extension_quality_score
Validate each feature for warmup, coverage, and causality
Publish and materialize all validated features onto trade surface
success_criteria: all priority-1 veto features validated, published, and materialized with warmup_ok and coverage_ok
priority-2 and priority-3 features at minimum contracted even if materialization is deferred
no feature leaks future information (causality check passed)
feature-level summary table completed (name, family, priority, validated, published, materialized, warmup_ok, coverage_ok)

stages.title: Dataset split и modeling surfaces для overlays
stages.objective: Create frozen trade-level train/selection-OOS/lockbox-OOS splits keyed by entry timestamp with purge gaps ≥24h, and assemble all modeling surfaces (all, long-only, short-only, weak-window).
actions: Split trades by entry timestamp into: train_trades, selection_oos_trades, lockbox_oos_trades
Enforce purge gap ≥24h between windows (max relevant holding horizon ~18h)
Assemble modeling surfaces: all_base_trades, long_base_trades, short_base_trades, weak_window_trades if needed
Lock down: feature selection uses selection OOS only; threshold selection uses selection OOS only
success_criteria: three-way split frozen with documented train/selection/lockbox windows
purge gaps ≥24h verified between all adjacent windows
all four modeling surfaces assembled with correct feature + label joins
split_method, label_contract, features_used, target_mean recorded in dataset metadata

stages.title: Veto-route plausibility stage
stages.objective: Train and evaluate CatBoost veto classifiers (balanced + conservative, long + short) on the training surface and assess on selection OOS whether any model can reliably identify the worst base trades.
actions: Train CatBoost-veto-short-balanced and CatBoost-veto-short-conservative on short-trade surface
Train CatBoost-veto-long-balanced and CatBoost-veto-long-conservative on long-trade surface
Evaluate on selection OOS: ROC AUC, PR AUC, worst-decile lift, precision in veto bucket, economic effect of removing top-risk trades
success_criteria: all 4 veto models trained with frozen labels and features
selection OOS metrics computed: AUC, PR AUC, precision in veto bucket
economic effect on selection OOS quantified (delta PnL if top-risk trades removed)
clear pass/fail determination: at least one model shows meaningful veto signal (AUC meaningfully above 0.50 with positive economic effect)

stages.title: Lockbox test for veto overlays
stages.objective: Apply the best veto models with frozen thresholds to the lockbox OOS window and compare overlay-augmented base vs immutable base to determine whether veto improvement is real.
actions: Freeze thresholds for best veto models from selection OOS
Run immutable base on lockbox trades
Run base + veto overlay on same lockbox trades
Compute: delta PnL, delta profit factor, delta drawdown, trades removed, PnL of removed trades, effect by weak windows
success_criteria: matched lockbox comparison completed: same trades, same notionals
delta PnL, delta PF, delta DD computed
removed trades and their PnL contribution analyzed
weak-window repair effect quantified
promoted_to_lockbox flag and final decision recorded for each model

stages.title: Early-cut route (conditional)
stages.objective: Train and evaluate CatBoost early-cut classifiers on selection OOS, but only if veto models demonstrated at least weak meaningful signal and post-entry failure signatures are distinguishable.
actions: Train CatBoost-earlycut-long-balanced and CatBoost-earlycut-long-conservative
Train CatBoost-earlycut-short-balanced and CatBoost-earlycut-short-conservative
Evaluate: cut quality (does it cut real losers more than future winners), net delta after fees, DD improvement
If models pass selection OOS, promote to lockbox test
success_criteria: condition met: veto route showed at least weak meaningful signal
early-cut models trained for both sides with frozen labels
selection OOS metrics: cut quality positive, economic effect positive after fees
clear pass/fail for lockbox promotion
stages.gate_hint: veto_models showed at least weak meaningful signal on selection OOS and post-entry failure signatures are distinguishable from future winners

stages.title: Hold-extension route (conditional)
stages.objective: Train and evaluate CatBoost extension classifiers on selection OOS, but only if the trade-surface atlas revealed an underheld winner cluster and selection diagnostics suggest extension has a chance.
actions: Train CatBoost-extend-long-balanced and CatBoost-extend-long-conservative
Train CatBoost-extend-short-balanced and CatBoost-extend-short-conservative
Evaluate: incremental PnL on extension subset, extension hit rate, DD impact
If models pass selection OOS, promote to lockbox test
success_criteria: condition met: trade-surface atlas showed underheld winner cluster and extension diagnostics are favorable
extension models trained for both sides with frozen labels
selection OOS metrics: incremental PnL positive, hit rate positive, no material DD worsening
clear pass/fail for lockbox promotion
stages.gate_hint: trade_surface_atlas revealed underheld winner cluster AND selection diagnostics show extension has plausible chance; early-cut route open is not a prerequisite but veto signal must exist

stages.title: Ownership, cannibalization и финальный overlay verdict
stages.objective: Compute ownership and cannibalization metrics for every surviving overlay route, produce a matched lockbox verdict vs immutable base, and deliver the final v8 decision (overlay success / partial / failed).
actions: For each surviving overlay route compute: ownership score, removed-bad-trades / saved-DD, overlap with weak-window clusters, cosmetic-vs-real improvement assessment
Run final matched lockbox comparison: immutable base vs base + all overlays on same lockbox window
Classify outcome: A (overlay success — at least one route improves base materially), B (partial — local watchlist effect only), C (failed — no sustainable improvement)
Write final v8 report with project_id, trade_surface summary, model results, route verdicts, and next_direction
success_criteria: ownership computed for every surviving overlay route
final matched lockbox comparison completed with delta metrics
outcome classified as A, B, or C with evidence
final v8 report written with all summary fields populated
operational checklist fully verified (12 items)

warnings: Stage ordering implies strict sequential gating: veto → early-cut → extension — parallel execution of these three routes is forbidden by design
Stages 8 and 9 are conditionally opened; if veto route fails, early-cut and extension are skipped entirely
